name: Rand Paul
subject: They treat it like a doormat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

228 years ago our Founders gathered in Philadelphia and created a document unlike any other.

Our Constitution outlined checks and balances and separation of powers which restrained the power of the federal government.

But Fellow Conservative, politicians in Washington these days treat our U.S. Constitution like a doormat -- treading and trampling on it at every opportunity.

As a result, our freedom and liberty have never been under greater assault.

I'm running for President to restore the Constitutional principles that made America the most free and prosperous nation on Earth.

**[Will you please stand with me by making your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471702:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)**?

The powerful special interest lobby that controls the Washington Machine is desperate to crush anyone who truly believes in individual liberty and Constitutional government.

And they're going all-out to silence my campaign and stamp out my message of liberty.

But no matter how heated it gets, no matter how vicious the attacks, I will NOT back down -- not now or ever!

I pledge to continue fighting to restore our God-given liberties with every ounce of energy I've got.

And I really need you in my corner right now.

**[So won't you please chip in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471702:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)**?

Thank you in advance for all you do.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471703:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471704:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471705:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471706:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471702:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471707:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471708:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30471709:WdeQX3mIN:m:1:879035888:BC9C8A4B1E6E7467504E4C215D463757:r)

name: Ed Brookover, BenCarson.com
subject: It's Ben's birthday -- will you sign his card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30471359:sjA3_3mNG:m:1:876315805:34B36DCDD8DC36BC66812571CD6E8B02:r)
---

Hey there Peter,

I'm Ed Brookover, the senior strategist for Dr. Carson's presidential campaign.

Today's a special day -- it's Ben's 64th birthday.

Here at the campaign we thought it'd be great if he could hear from you and his millions of supporters around the country.

[**Will you take just a moment to sign his card and include a personal note?
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30471359:sjA3_3mNG:m:1:876315805:34B36DCDD8DC36BC66812571CD6E8B02:r)
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30471359:sjA3_3mNG:m:1:876315805:34B36DCDD8DC36BC66812571CD6E8B02:r)
---
Ben's a great man and it's an honor to work for him. Please help us wish him a Happy Birthday. Let's let him know how much we appreciate his leadership and his love for America.

Sincerely,

Ed Brookover
Senior Strategist

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30471360:sjA3_3mNG:m:1:876315805:34B36DCDD8DC36BC66812571CD6E8B02:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30471361:sjA3_3mNG:m:1:876315805:34B36DCDD8DC36BC66812571CD6E8B02:r)

name: Ron Paul
subject: The Constitution won't protect itself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

Last night and today I am reminded of something. There are simply too few people fighting for the Constitution and the Bill of Rights in politics today

During Wednesday night's debate, we saw someone who stands up every day: my son, Rand Paul.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477223:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)

Whether it was his opposition to war in Iraq or fighting back against the federal war on drugs, Rand showed he was the only one on that stage who truly understands freedom and a limited, constitutional government.

Now, today, **[I ask you to stand with him](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477223:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)**.

228 years ago, delegates met and signed our Constitution.

It has never been more under attack. I fear it will continue unless Rand Paul is our next president.

**[You can help ensure that with your contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477223:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)**.

Whether it is auditing an out of control federal reserve or fighting the Patriot Act, the simple fact is, Rand stands up for you and me and our belief in Liberty.

Of course, the media plays favorites and tries to keep their televised reality show going. They give Rand less time just like they did to me. Our message scares them.

And it should. A Rand Paul presidency would be a threat to the status quo.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477223:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)

Rand had to ensure he could get some extra time, so he even bought his own ads during the debate Wednesday night!

Help him run more now, and capitalize on a strong performance, with **[your contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477223:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)**.

The Constitution won't protect itself. Someone has to stand and fight.

That someone is my son, Rand Paul. **[Please help him today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477223:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477224:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477225:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477226:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477227:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477223:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)

Ron Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477228:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477229:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30477230:WMVUg3mNF:m:1:879035888:8D2B3AF98A237BD1591298EAC920B558:r)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Hey
body:
Friend -

Wednesday night I laid out my conservative ideas to move this nation forward. I shared my heart, shared my results-oriented record in Florida and outlined my positive vision for our country's future.

We're now one step closer to defeating Hillary Clinton in 2016, and we couldn't have taken that step without you. [**But these next few days, I 'm going to need your support more than ever.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wvdqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhdzlnl_nprddjkw.html)

The false and petty attacks from both sides on my proven conservative record have been coming nonstop since our great debate Wednesday, and I can't fight back on my own.

[**That 's why I need you to chip in $10 or more right now. If you step up with a gift of $10 or more by midnight tonight, my team will send you a limited-edition #AllinForJeb wristband in the mail.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rnjfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbscwrtn_nprddjkw.html)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/fsyztbylrnjwqpqdwbfzrwcpyywclptlzbgbjlpdrsgb_nprddjkw.html)
Friend, Wednesday night wasn't about me or any other candidate on stage. It was about the millions of hardworking Americans like you who are desperate for leadership and ideas they can believe in again.

America has always overcome big challenges, and we still can because we're the greatest country in the history of the world. But we aren't going to get there by yelling at each other and spreading a constant stream of pessimistic, divisive rhetoric.

[**I 'm offering something different - leadership and results. But that will only become a reality if you chip in $10 or more to our Debate Response Fund now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mqsgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcsqbn_nprddjkw.html)

Hurry, you only have until tonight at midnight to get your limited-edition wristband: [**Jeb2016.com/Debate-Response-Fund/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/blckvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnpblcq_nprddjkw.html)

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/akpzrylgsphnbcbmnywzsnvcllnvgcrgzytyhgcmsktt_nprddjkw.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3881&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

subject: TODAY: Watch Ted live at Heritage Action's Take Back America Forum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:

| Dear Friend,

This afternoon, Ted will speak at Heritage Action's Take Back America Presidential Forum, and we wanted to make sure you didn't miss it.

Ted is scheduled to begin his remarks at 6:00 pm ET and the forum is being streamed online live here: [http://takebackevent.com](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=L467dBYxdPzJCnZE6nveflV3cvlxpyyyNHstR5hCGjo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEphm1QOoQs0ObNG8aKWaXrBG4JNVQgpyNAJEwBavlMDYIWiAhQd8PCXWzB7KLMtlqo3LsqavYTsH-2FJGldoyh4Fiv51IFgnWl0l3PiaQoujN23-2FwM-2BbFz6mDAIxGY0eUC0DBWoxQI7Vp0mDX9VKr2jr0OyFSlZRMkaZhwOgAuwitB8wjANsyzahT7Nx-2Fv7JRQmacQ8d9BAHsrE3W8UUr-2FMn-2BBouE44LTbX-2B8CcHq76XxmaxQNtUAqGP0nIk-2B1D9EXn6HPugZs-2BALBPai5C0-2BJgOpIMb2xXa8VDLKsupNWVeUBz7g0yBDA-2BYM73suEQKfXk4dzCPsARrkBE8-2BJRQ5rYyv7Rt9WWaIhZZRWoM1oUVvLLUuBK1JgZj-2BuqFvD8Hw6M-3D).

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: See this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, in this week's Reagan Library debate, Gov. John Kasich again demonstrated the judgment, knowledge and demeanor it takes to lead America starting on his very first day as President. Watch this short highlight video and please share it!

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30481769:s6GkAJmNC:m:1:958431888:8A1A77C835D669F3F22E81BDB9E23F2E:r)

Also, be sure to tune in on Sunday - Gov. Kasich will be on **CNN's "State of the Union"** at 9:00AM & Noon EDT and **NBC's "Meet the Press"** ([find your local listing here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30481772:s6GkAJmNC:m:1:958431888:8A1A77C835D669F3F22E81BDB9E23F2E:r)).

name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Karl Rove
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
A nasty attack against Hillary: | Friend --

Karl Rove and his super PAC just released their first ad in New Hampshire attacking Hillary, asking "how could she possibly serve as president?"

I'll tell you how: She'll fight to make college more affordable, ensure women have access to health care, and that our economy works for everyone, not only those at the very top.

**Chip in $1 or more to make sure we can fight back against Rove and his friends:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| **Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM1NDYwNDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxODczMzQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Matt Carle
subject: About the CNN Debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW DAY FOR AMERICA NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| | [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=96707&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DZ5A4-HpPA6I) _**Washington Post:** "A distinct pragmatic sensibility"_ _**Politico:** “The tough, informed and reasonable guy”_ Friend – Wednesday night, John Kasich proved, once again, why he's the only candidate who can beat the Democrats in 2016. While others bickered and played politics on stage, Gov. Kasich looked and acted like a real leader because **he IS a real leader.** Check out the debate highlight video below and share on social media! [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=96707&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DZ5A4-HpPA6I) [Also, please consider donating $50, $75, $100 to help us spread John Kasich’s positive message for America.](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=96707&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FDonate) [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=96707&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FDonate) Thank you for your support! **Matt Carle**
